questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '955015e7-9e36-444f-b585-aeea3aefeb34' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '8af0b0c0-e847-40d3-bf88-dc02ed34c69f'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '955015e7-9e36-444f-b585-aeea3aefeb34'; delete from question_items where id = '955015e7-9e36-444f-b585-aeea3aefeb34';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
